task_instruction: Build the real final report from the completed final training and LLC campaign artifacts. Use only immutable real outputs under results/02_final_training/final_training_20260620T053855Z and results/03_llc_campaign/llc_campaign_final_training_20260620T053855Z_batch16; do not use reference/mock_report data. The report must state evidence, uncertainty, failure modes, runtime, cost projection, gate decisions, and exact cautious scientific wording: a changepoint in an SLT-derived local geometric estimate aligned with a behavioral transition only if supported. Include the token-0 LLC rejection and diagnostics, preserve null/smooth alternatives where warranted, update state/current_status.json, state/decision_log.md, and state/experiment_registry.csv, and run report validation/smoke checks. Success criterion: a committed report-phase run under results/04_report/ with source-linked tables/figures, reproducibility metadata, validation passing, and state advanced to report complete or a clearly documented reportable limitation.
rationale: AGENTS.md and the executive plan require the ordered gate sequence, immutable real outputs, chain diagnostics, cautious non-phase-transition wording, and phase-state updates. Infrastructure, pilot, final training, and LLC have completed within the unattended envelope; the live next action is report construction. With 6.637 hours remaining and about $49.15 of hard-cap headroom, a bounded report tick is the highest-value restartable action. The last executor decision was completed, so diagnose_and_fix is not needed.
